metadata.description: Query metrics for Hospital DB Dashboard API endpoints

queries.name: get_database_overview
queries.description: Get complete database statistics for dashboard header
queries.performance_notes: Uses information_schema which is already optimized. Safe for frequent execution.

queries.name: get_table_engine_distribution
queries.description: Get distribution of storage engines
queries.performance_notes: Aggregation query on information_schema. Low cost.

queries.name: get_modules_count
queries.description: Count modules from classification data
queries.performance_notes: Uses pre-computed classification. In static mode, uses JSON directly.

queries.name: get_modules_list
queries.description: Get all modules with their statistics
queries.performance_notes: Requires table scans for row counts. Cache recommended.

queries.name: get_module_top_tables
queries.description: Get top N tables by size for each module
queries.performance_notes: Simple ORDER BY with LIMIT. Well optimized.

queries.name: get_module_detail
queries.description: Get detailed information for a specific module
queries.performance_notes: Filtered by module, returns limited results. Parameterized query safe.

queries.name: get_module_table_issues
queries.description: Get anomaly issues for tables in a module
queries.performance_notes: Joins with anomaly data. Low cost for filtered results.

queries.name: get_anomaly_categories
queries.description: Get all anomaly categories with counts
queries.performance_notes: UNION ALL queries are efficient. Cache aggressively.

queries.name: get_anomaly_severity_summary
queries.description: Get overall severity distribution
queries.performance_notes: Aggregation with CASE statements. Low cost.

queries.name: get_anomaly_category_tables
queries.description: Get all tables with a specific anomaly type
queries.performance_notes: Can return many rows. Pagination recommended for UI.

queries.name: get_index_recommendations
queries.description: Get all recommended indexes with priorities
queries.performance_notes: Pre-computed recommendations. Changes rarely, cache for 24h.

queries.name: get_index_gap_analysis
queries.description: Detailed analysis of missing indexes
queries.performance_notes: Subqueries on statistics table. Medium cost.

queries.name: get_tables_paginated
queries.description: Get paginated list of all tables
queries.performance_notes: Simple pagination with LIMIT/OFFSET. Add index on data_length for sorting.

queries.name: get_tables_count
queries.description: Get total count for pagination
queries.performance_notes: Simple COUNT query on information_schema.

queries.name: get_tables_by_module
queries.description: Get tables filtered by module
queries.performance_notes: Uses table naming patterns for module classification.

queries.name: get_table_detail
queries.description: Get complete information for a single table
queries.performance_notes: Single row lookup. Very efficient.

queries.name: get_table_columns
queries.description: Get all columns for a table
queries.performance_notes: Filtered by table_name. Low cost.

queries.name: get_table_indexes
queries.description: Get all indexes for a table
queries.performance_notes: GROUP BY on index_name. Low cost.

queries.name: get_table_issues
queries.description: Get issues specific to a table
queries.performance_notes: Subqueries for issue detection. Low cost for single table.

queries.name: search_tables
queries.description: Search tables by name pattern
queries.performance_notes: LIKE queries on table_name. Short cache due to user input variation.

queries.name: search_modules
queries.description: Search modules by name or description
queries.performance_notes: Uses pre-defined module list. Very fast.

queries.name: search_columns
queries.description: Search columns across all tables
queries.performance_notes: Requires column scan. Medium cost, limited to 100 results.

queries.name: calculate_health_score
queries.description: Calculate overall database health score (0-100)
queries.performance_notes: Multiple subqueries with aggregations. Cache recommended.

queries.name: get_health_breakdown
queries.description: Get detailed health metrics breakdown
queries.performance_notes: UNION ALL with aggregations. Medium cost.

queries.name: get_top_modules_by_size
queries.description: Get top modules ordered by database size
queries.performance_notes: Aggregation with CROSS JOIN. Efficient for small module sets.

queries.name: get_table_growth_estimate
queries.description: Estimate table growth based on auto_increment
queries.performance_notes: Simple WHERE on auto_increment. Low cost.

queries.name: get_duplicate_tables
queries.description: Find potentially duplicate/backup tables
queries.performance_notes: Pattern matching on table_name. Rare changes, long cache.

recommended_indexes.reason: Speed up table lookups by schema and name
Speed up primary key detection queries

cache_strategy.description: Recommended caching strategy for dashboard queries

layers.description: Cache query results at application level
Cache API responses for anonymous users
MariaDB query cache for identical queries

invalidation_rules.description: Clear all cache when schema changes detected
Clear specific module cache when data is refreshed
Clear anomaly cache when new analysis runs

static_data_mode.description: When using static JSON data instead of live DB connection

data_sources.usage: Primary data source for table statistics

implementation.action: Load JSON files into memory on application startup
implementation.description: Parse and index JSON data for fast lookups

implementation.action: Transform JSON data to match API response format
implementation.description: Use JavaScript/TypeScript transformations instead of SQL
Set appropriate TTL for each data type
Reload JSON files when they change on disk

performance_tips.description: Always run EXPLAIN on queries before deploying to production
Use LIMIT/OFFSET for large result sets. Consider cursor-based pagination for infinite scroll.
If using MariaDB query cache, monitor hit ratio and adjust cache size
Implement connection pooling to reduce connection overhead
For high-traffic dashboards, use read replicas for queries
Combine related queries into single requests to reduce round trips
